Cited authorities (KOIDE_Q_ONSITE_SOURCE_DOMAIN_NO_GO_SYNTHESIS_NOTE, KOIDE_Q_SO2_PHASE_ERASURE_SUPPORT_NOTE, etc.) are themselves support-grade with explicit open primitives.
